case_title: BILLY VAUGHN VS. MYRRIAH RESNECK ET AL

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-14-2021 - JUDGMENT.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VAUGHN, BILLY IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT RESNECK, MYRRIAH LUCAS, BENJAMIN CHANGES IN THE LEASE TERM MUST BE GIVEN TO THE TENANT FOLLOWING PROPER NOTICE REQUIREMENTS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,404.00 FILED BY VAUGHN, BILLY AS TO DEFENDANT RESNECK, MYRRIAH LUCAS, BENJAMIN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-14-2021 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-14-2021 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-14-2021 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF BILLY VAUGHN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MYRRIAH RESNECK IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT BENJAMIN LUCAS IS PRESENT. BOTH DEFENDANTS WAIVES SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
